headline: How Investors May Respond To Jacobs Solutions (J) Securing New Multi-Year Global Infrastructure Contracts
summary: In recent weeks, TransnetBW, National Highways and Naval Facilities Engineering Systems Command Washington have each selected Jacobs Solutions for multi-year, multidisciplinary frameworks and design contracts spanning energy grid modernization, transport infrastructure and U.S. military facilities. These wins expand Jacobs’ role across critical energy, transport and defense programs in Germany, the U.K. and the U.S., reinforcing its position as an integrated partner on complex,...
